reviews.comment:

Excellent place, clean, the staff treat you like a friend, a real treat

reviews.comment:
Necesitaría mejorar los baños, no son malos pero tampoco cómodos y muchas veces falta higiene. El resto normal. Hay señal de teléfono celular.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms need improvement; they're not bad, but they're not comfortable either, and hygiene is often lacking. Everything else is fine. There's cell phone service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlc0tXd1pBEAE

reviews.comment:
El shop desactualizado. La comida regular para abajo. Mejorable todo.

(Translated by Google)
The shop is outdated. The food is mediocre at best. Everything could be improved.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlNTRIc3p3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pense que los precios iban a ser desorbitados. Pero no.

(Translated by Google)
I thought the prices were going to be exorbitant. But they weren't.

reviews.comment:
Muy caro, se abusan porque es lo único que hay en kilómetros....poca comida para elegir, no sale de la milanesa y hamburguesa. Una lástima.

(Translated by Google)
Very expensive, they take advantage of the situation because it's the only option for miles around... limited food choices, nothing but breaded cutlets and hamburgers. A real shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlX2RYN1h3EAE
